name: Brandon Davis, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Here's the truth:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35ed/9e00690/57ccae56/24009af3/3315433473/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&source=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx")
Friends,

Mayor Gillum and our team aren't taking anything for granted when it comes to this election.

We see how hard supporters like you are working -- whether it's after school, or once the kids are in bed, or on a day off. We know you're donating what you can, and for a lot of Floridians, any amount is a real sacrifice.

But we hear and see the same attacks against Mayor Gillum and our grassroots movement that you do -- and it's clear the other side is willing to say anything, no matter how outlandish the lie, to hold onto power. We all know Florida can't afford another four years of the status quo.

**[We can't allow all the hard work we've done to be canceled out in the final days of the election -- so before the final reporting deadline for the State of Florida tomorrow at midnight, please strengthen our campaign with a donation of $5 or more.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35ed/9e00690/57ccae56/24009a8b/3315433473/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=9+-+We+cant+allow+all+the+hard+work+weve+don")**

No matter what they say, here's the truth about why Mayor Gillum is the Governor that Floridians need to lead us forward:

He's fighting for you. He's in this for the Floridian who's struggling to pay for healthcare because they haven't had a steady, good-paying job in years. He's focused on the young people who want a good education but aren't being given equal opportunity to succeed in public schools. And most of all, Mayor Gillum is focused on putting everyday Floridians first, not serving special interests.

**[We're doing everything we can to get Mayor Gillum's message out and make sure we have the resources to win, but we need your help to get out the vote before tomorrow night. So please, chip in $5 or more now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35ed/9e00690/57ccae56/24009a8a/3315433473/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=10+-+Were+doing+everything+we+can+to+get+Mayo")**

Bring it home,

Brandon Davis
Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35ed/9e00690/57ccae56/24009a8d/3315433473/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=11+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35ed/9e00690/57ccae56/24009a8c/3315433473/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35ed/9e00690/57ccae56/24009a8f/3315433473/VEsHBg/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&source=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35ed/9e00690/57ccae56/24009a8e/3315433473/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=14+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx&source=em18_181031_FinFR5_fnd_gq_act__BD_ettx")

name: Team Scholten
subject: 🎃 Now that you're all done trick-or-treating... 👻
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Halloween is almost over Peter, but the scariest thing yet is still ahead of us—the thought of another two years of Steve King representing Iowa in Congress.
**And it’s not just Democrats that think so.**
Here’s an amazing exchange that took place today on _Andrea Mitchell Reports_ between Andrea Mitchell and Florida **Republican** Carlos Curbelo:
Curbelo (when asked about Steve King): _His comments and his actions are disgusting. And look, I know nothing about his opponent Andrea, but I will tell you this, I would never cast a ballot for someone like Steve King._
Mitchell: _Even if it meant losing control of the House?_
Curbelo: _I would never cast a ballot for someone like Steve King._
This was stunning.
**A sitting U.S. Congressman, a Republican, would rather his party lose coveted control of the U.S. House, than cast a vote for a colleague from his own party!**
What does that say about Steve King?
It says we need to remove him from office. The most recent poll showed J.D. only one point down and we’ve got just six days left to go.
Halloween is almost over. Now it’s time to get rid of the most frightening member of Congress. **[_Click here to donate whatever you can to help defeat Steve King!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2947675/19119112/1979526802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTJhNTU0NS04ZGRkLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z76r0tv7-Jcv7faau0QUPw6IO8Cb8MMdZHYAlXNfZo0=)**
Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2947676/19119113/1979526802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTJhNTU0NS04ZGRkLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z76r0tv7-Jcv7faau0QUPw6IO8Cb8MMdZHYAlXNfZo0=)

body:
Our final deadline before Election Day is Wednesday.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203989/2fde7c66/49d481a0/15686be7/3103415546/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
We're just hours from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, Friend.

It doesn't get any bigger than this -- this is our **final deadline** before the Nov. 6 election. If we can't hit our budget goal tonight, our chances of breaking the majority get much smaller.

**I'll get right to the point, Friend. We simply can't afford to fall short of our goal tonight. I'm all in on breaking the majority, and I need you to be, too. Can I count on you to chip in before midnight?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203989/2fde7c66/49d481a0/15686be6/3103415546/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---

Your support means a lot.

We are going to elect candidates who believe in public education. We are going to elect candidates who believe that people should have quality health care. We want legislators who are going to make it easier for people to register and vote, not harder.

We can do this on November 6th. But the first step is making sure we stay on top of our goal tonight.

[**When the clock hits midnight tonight, I'm hoping we will have hit our goal. Chip in now before the deadline if you can.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203989/2fde7c66/49d481a0/15686bfa/3103415546/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaleom?refcode=20181027_btm_eom5")

Roy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Flip_the_House_=28S=C3=A1nchez_for_Congress=29?=
subject: CA-25 is too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Will you donate to ensure Katie Hill's victory? Peter,

We've told you about Katie Hill a few times now. She's an advocate for homeless veterans and an executive with years of experience in the nonprofit sector. She's running in California's 25th District against Steve Knight, a Republican congressman who's rubber-stamped every bit of the Trump agenda.

If we want to take back the House, we need to win every race like Katie's. But the latest forecast from _FiveThirtyEight_ has CA-25 within THREE POINTS -- too close to call. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?refcode=RTW_181031_Hill_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **[Whether Katie wins or loses on November 6 will come down to grassroots supporters like you. Can you chip in $25 or more right now to ensure Katie's victory?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?refcode=RTW_181031_Hill_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Katie Hill and Linda S anchez:_ | | ******[Donate $10 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503669c/4ac3d62d/69f04950/1ce29aad/2736192337/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_181031_Hill_EM")******

******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?refcode=RTW_181031_Hill_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
Steve Knight isn't fighting for us. After refusing to endorse in the 2016 presidential election -- and saying he was disturbed by Donald Trump's behavior -- he still voted for Trump anyway.

Since then, Congressman Knight has voted with Donald Trump 98.9% of the time.

Katie Hill would bring a principled, independent voice to the 25th District. Steve Knight is just more of the same failed policies and leadership that have let Donald Trump run amok.

[**Please, help us make a change and flip this seat. Chip in to support Katie Hill before Election Day >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?refcode=RTW_181031_Hill_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Onward,

name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Ceasefire, Quickly Broken
body:
A Ceasefire, Quickly Broken No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-s/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-y/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-j/) [A Ceasefire, Quickly Broken](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-t/)I just got home from a rally at a place in downtown Cincinnati on 6th Street, called The Backstage Event Center. Among the Republican candidates who spoke at this Boisterous event, one week before a major election, were Congressman Warren Davis, Senator Rob Portman, Ohio Attorney General Mike DeWine, and oh yeah, me. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-i/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-d/)
### [Two Weeks Out - So How's the Election Looking?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-h/)
A lot better than it looked two months ago, or two weeks ago for that matter. I think things are trending in the right direction. The Democrats' advantage on the generic ballot has narrowed significantly - from double digits to low single digits. And in the so-called battleground congressional districts, the ones that are hotly contested this time around (like mine), and will decide which party controls the House after the election, the generic ballot is essentially a dead heat. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-k/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [Trump, Robert E. Lee, Some Nut Hates Republicans, and Our First Debate Last Night](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-o/)
As I'm sure you know, President Trump came to town last Friday. And since I kind of had a ring side seat as the whole thing unfolded, I thought I'd share what I saw. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-b/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [A Smear Campaign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-p/)
I've had races over the years where my opponents and their left-wing Washington allies have attempted to distort my record and mislead voters. After all, this is politics, and as they say, "politics ain't beanbag." Another quote I remember hearing was "politics is a contact sport." I googled that phrase to see who said it, and it was me! No kidding. Try googling it. I thought I had heard it from someone else, but what the heck. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-x/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-m/)
### [Our Next Ad](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-c/)
First, an admission. When I watch TV (which is rare these days since I'm in a pretty challenging re-election race this time) I rarely watch commercials. I flip to another station to see what's on, and if there's an ad there, I'll flip to a different station. Drives my wife crazy, so we typically watch stuff on different TV's when I'm in town. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-q/) [Donate](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-a/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-f/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-v/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-e/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Like ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-g/)
[ Tweet ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-w/)
[ Forward ](http://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jjuhxkd-l-yd)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jjuhxkd-961825B2-kujkulhluu-yh) | [Unsubscribe](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jjuhxkd-kujkulhluu-yk/)

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cbf9d/24c69fd9/219ae19b1/18bc576c/3130749304/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEVH3N_digital_email_20181031_OctEOMLastChance_inact&source=WQEFEVH3N_digital_email_20181031_OctEOMLastChance_inact")

Peter,

Tonight is the final End-of-Month deadline before Election Day. Can you believe it? We have come so far.

EMILY's List has been nonstop in our efforts to help elect women this year, and the finish line is now finally in view. This is so exciting!

With just a few hours left to hit our fundraising goal and so much on the line, can our women count on your support, Peter?

**Donate $3 before midnight tonight to help reach our $750,000 goal and help elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot in just six days:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-October-End-of-Month-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cbf9d/24c69fd9/219ae19b1/18bc576d/3130749304/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181025_email_OctEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitOctoberEndofM&utm_campaign=WQEFEVH3N_digital_email_20181031_OctEOMLastChance_inact&source=WQEFEVH3N_digital_email_20181031_OctEOMLastChance_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

P.S. This is your last chance to donate toward our goal before it expires at midnight tonight. **[For the last time in October, can you donate to help elect women?](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cbf9d/24c69fd9/219ae19b1/18bc576e/3130749304/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181025_email_OctEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+For+the+last+time+in+October+can+you+don&utm_campaign=WQEFEVH3N_digital_email_20181031_OctEOMLastChance_inact&source=WQEFEVH3N_digital_email_20181031_OctEOMLastChance_inact")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tom=E2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: I need your help right now, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
You've gotten a lot of emails from my team this week. But this is the last note you'll get from us tonight -- I promise!
Friends, You've gotten a lot of emails from my team this week. But this is the last note you'll get from us tonight -- I promise! Midnight is my final end-of-month fundraising deadline of the entire race. And though our online fundraising has improved some today, it's slowed down this week overall, and I need 51 of you to make a donation right now, or we will not make our goal. Here is the link to donate: [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/donate**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b4_tomiphone_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Your support has been so critical to my campaign so far, friends, and I would really appreciate it if you would stick with us for 6 more days so we can win. This race is a must-win for Democrats or we will lose the House, and I can't keep up the fight for Arizona families alone. Thank you again, and if you can chip in before midnight, here is the link: [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/donate**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.31_b4_tomiphone_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom Sent from my iPhone

| Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonians. Not the news I wanted to share, friends.
We just missed our crucial end-of-month fundraising goal by about $10,000. I can't tell you how important it is to make up this budget gap - and with your help, I know we can do it.
**If we don't close this gap, Chris Sununu and his wealthy corporate donors will keep New Hampshire red and continue pushing their disastrous agenda in the Granite State. Because I'm not accepting any corporate donations, I simply _cannot_ defeat him without your grassroots support.**

clean_body: Hi there, Tammy Baldwin reached out recently because her fundraising came to a grinding halt at the worst possible time. With 5 days until the election and Donald Trump 's recent campaign stop in Wisconsin, this is pretty problematic for her campaign. If Tammy is going to persevere in the last days of this campaign, she needs to catch up on her goals ASAP. There's no time left! Tammy's not relying on corporate billionaires or super PACs, she's depending on you. And you know what? She needs your help more than ever before. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Tammy Baldwin and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Thank you so much for your help. It could really make or break this race. Best, Team Maggie "" _

Peter,

Tens of thousands of our supporters have already voted, but we need many thousands more! **You can help push us over the top** this evening and over the next few days as we get out the vote. Help from wherever you are! Here are actions you can join:
* **Thursday Power Phone Bank, 6pm-8pm!**
* **Join us at our Austin HQ,** 5460 Guadalupe, starting at 6pm. Bring a phone and a laptop or tablet.
* **Join us from wherever you are**. Use a computer to log in to [www.relaydial.com/siegeldialer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2957194/19212961/-748023480?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI3ZGRiMS1mNGRkLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wmc0LY1QOscqb6NLsdEtQnIGNvT79Qs8uZtd9-ddjdc=). [Script is here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2957195/19212962/1192903788?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI3ZGRiMS1mNGRkLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wmc0LY1QOscqb6NLsdEtQnIGNvT79Qs8uZtd9-ddjdc=). Andrew can answer any questions you have: andrew@siegelfortexas.org or 508-333-6457.
* **Thursday Block Walk![We'll start in Austin at 4:30pm today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2957196/19212963/1284355644?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI3ZGRiMS1mNGRkLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wmc0LY1QOscqb6NLsdEtQnIGNvT79Qs8uZtd9-ddjdc=)**, meeting at 1011 Apollo Drive.

* **[Katy at noon](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2957199/19212966/-1584599459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI3ZGRiMS1mNGRkLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wmc0LY1QOscqb6NLsdEtQnIGNvT79Qs8uZtd9-ddjdc=)**. * **[Cypress at 3:30pm](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2957202/19212969/1272142058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI3ZGRiMS1mNGRkLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wmc0LY1QOscqb6NLsdEtQnIGNvT79Qs8uZtd9-ddjdc=)**. * **[Sealy at 2pm](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2957203/19212970/915322492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI3ZGRiMS1mNGRkLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wmc0LY1QOscqb6NLsdEtQnIGNvT79Qs8uZtd9-ddjdc=)**. Meet at Cazadores Mexican Restaurant, 241 Gebhardt Road.

In addition to these events, we'll be working in several other locations every day until Election Day. To learn more about what is happening in your neck of the woods, reach out to our field directors:
* Travis County: Briana Burns, briana@siegelfortexas.org
* Bastrop and Lee counties: Ben Deatrick, ben@siegelfortexas.org
* Washington, Fayette, Austin, and Colorado counties: Andrew Dysert, andrew@siegelfortexas.org
* Waller and Harris counties: Jacob Aronowitz, jacob@siegelfortexas.org

We can win! And every vote we turn out helps Beto and every Democrat up and down the ticket. Join us! Mike P.S. Had the great pleasure of joining students for early voting at Prairie View A&M yesterday. They definitely understand that every vote counts!

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: This is what our country needs.
body:
Peter,
If you, like me, were one of the 61% of Christians who voted in 2016, we can thank God and each other for what’s been accomplished:
* **Reinstating the Mexico City policy** —halting taxpayer dollars from funding international NGOs performing or promoting abortions.
* **Confirming a constitutional majority on the U.S. Supreme Court** —who will decide future cases of freedom of religion and speech in our churches, businesses, schools, and homes.
* **Bringing home 17 Americans** —including Pastor Andrew Brunson—from false imprisonment abroad.
* **Recognizing Jerusalem as the capital of Israel** —and relocating the U.S. Embassy forthwith.

Yet 39% of Christians in America failed to vote in 2016. Just think of the communities and states across the country that could have been positively impacted by voters choosing biblical principles at the polls.
**It’s estimated even more faith voters will fail to vote this election, as many as 50 million could choose not to vote.**
I’ve heard time and again how people are disgusted by “dirty politics” and therefore want no part of the process.
But I bet those same folks whine and complain when they think their taxes are too high, when they drive over potholes in the streets, when they think there aren’t enough police patrols in their neighborhoods, or when their schools undermine the traditional values parents teach their kids at home.
Everyone needs to learn that the laws you live under, the roads you drive on, the security and safety of your neighborhood and the quality of the schools your kids and grandkids attend are the result of someone else’s politics.
**The political process needs Christians’ involvement** , and voting is the only way to get the body of our nation the nutrients it needs.
[Will you join me in praying, voting and donating whatever amount you can today so we can reach 100% of Christians by Election Day?](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181101apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181101apl01nd&n=1)
Your donation of $5, $10, $50, $100, or any amount can still make a difference.
My Faith Votes is focused on getting Christians to the polls. That is why we spend most of our campaign funds in the last 3 weeks before election day. And in these final 5 days before the election, we are increasing our media spend even more to reach potential Christian voters online, through Christian television networks, and on radio stations across the country.
But we need your help to make this possible. [That’s why a donation of any amount will make a difference.](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181101apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181101apl01nd&n=2)
Together if all people of faith voted November 6, 2018, we could empower and elect representatives to:
* **Pass the _Pain-Capable Child Protection Act_** —making late-term abortions illegal (just _four_ S. Senate votes away from passing in 2018).
* **Defund Planned Parenthood** (just _one_ S. Senate vote from passing in 2017).
* **Confirm up to two more U.S. Supreme Court Justices.**
* **Repeal the _Johnson Amendment_** (failed to repeal in 2017 due to 60 vote majority required rather than a simple majority in the U.S. Senate).
* and so much more!

We are days away from an incredibly important set of elections. Christians don’t have to like the process or even the people in the battle. But sit it out and Christians will get what the people who voted give them.
This is no time to be apathetic.
**_It’s clear our country needs more of God, not less._** And the people who will change that are the people who fear God and are willing to vote!
Don’t be an all-talk, no action Christian. Better yet, help make sure others vote their faith.
[Please prayerfully partner with us in these final 5 days before Tuesday.](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181101apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181101apl01nd&n=3)
See you at the polls!
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181101apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181101apl01nd&n=4)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181101apl01nd&n=5)
P.S. [To be sure no Christian fails to wield their God-given rights at the ballot box, will you please donate at least $5, $10, or $20 this week to help us reach and reclaim the faith voter? Every prayer—and every vote—matters.](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181101apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181101apl01nd&n=6)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181101apl01nd&n=7).

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Good morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, it's finally November and this is it - in five days this campaign will come to its end.

That's a neat thing about campaigns: There's always a finite answer at the end. On November 6th we'll know if we met our greatest goal: the one of turning out as many Virginians as possible to vote so they can be heard, so they can create change.

**The next five days could determine our ability to safeguard access to health care, to protect our seniors, to keep our communities safe from gun violence, and so much more. It 's that simple, and that critical. [Will you click here to help Virginia Democrats in our final push to turn out voters, Derek? That extra $5 could get us to one more door, and one more race-deciding vote.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1089/3e0906/75e04dc3/3e37116c/4292441083/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+click+here+to+help+Virginia+Dem&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1089/3e0906/75e04dc3/3e371160/4292441083/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND")

Many of the House races here are dead heats, and the voters we turn out in the next five days will be what puts them over the edge, sending new Democrats to the House so we can take a majority.

Keeping the resources flowing out to every corner of Virginia is how we do this. More supplies, more information and more volunteers means more votes and a stronger democracy. It's some of the best math I know.

**So I have one last fundraising deadline on the horizon: November 6th, 2018. Can you help me meet this biggest goal of all? Get out there and vote, and if you can throw in 5 more bucks, you 'll help others get out and vote as well:**
[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1089/3e0906/75e04dc3/3e37117c/4292441083/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND")

Your friend,

Tim Kaine

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1089/3e0906/75e04dc3/3e37114d/4292441083/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_TK_November-LDND") Thanks for having Tim's back!

2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

clean_body: | | Derek, it's finally November and this is it - in five days this campaign will come to its end. That's a neat thing about campaigns: There's always a finite answer at the end. On November 6th we'll know if we met our greatest goal: the one of turning out as many Virginians as possible to vote so they can be heard, so they can create change. The next five days could determine our ability to safeguard access to health care, to protect our seniors, to keep our communities safe from gun violence, and so much more. It 's that simple, and that critical. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" Many of the House races here are dead heats, and the voters we turn out in the next five days will be what puts them over the edge, sending new Democrats to the House so we can take a majority. Keeping the resources flowing out to every corner of Virginia is how we do this. More supplies, more information and more volunteers means more votes and a stronger democracy. It's some of the best math I know. So I have one last fundraising deadline on the horizon: November 6th, 2018. Can you help me meet this biggest goal of all? Get out there and vote, and if you can throw in 5 more bucks, you 'll help others get out and vote as well: "" Your friend, Tim Kaine "" * | "" "" ""

name: Sydney Snow
subject: Your last chance to early vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Don't miss your chance!

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379172/7ab0e2c4/7e623ca7/3499b947/1614686661/VEsH/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/early_voting.html") Hey, friend! Real quick -- Today is the final day to early vote in Maryland. Early vote centers have seen record turnout -- _more than double the amount of people have early voted so far versus turnout in 2014._ With turnout numbers that high, we know Larry Hogan's scared. And he should be. **Ignore the pundits -- these are the same ones who said we'd lose the primary! Just focus on the facts -- and the fact is that when turnout is high, Democrats win. That's why you need to early vote.** [**Find your early voting center now and go vote for Ben! It's either today, or you have to wait till Election Day, but why wait? Early vote now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c379172/7ab0e2c4/7e623ca7/3499b947/1614686661/VEsE/ "https://elections.maryland.gov/voting/early_voting.html") Thanks, Sydney Sydney Snow

**Mike Braun opposes abortion,
even to save the life of the mother or in cases of rape or incest.
He’s TOO extreme. We have to keep him out of the Senate.** | **[**PITCH IN TO RE-ELECT JOE DONNELLY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2959422/19231825/771852304?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FiZjc3Yi0wM2RlLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cufE0xGPLvED2fcAqOqjupillh6nMqaQPOPwdFw17BQ=&refcode=20181101i&amount=25)**

Mike Braun is **100% anti-choice -- no exceptions. No exceptions for rape. No exceptions for incest. No exceptions for the life of the mother.**
**_And recent polling still shows this GOP extremist LEADING Democrat Joe Donnelly for Indiana’s Senate seat._**

We need **[YOUR help](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2959423/19231826/771852304?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2FiZjc3Yi0wM2RlLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cufE0xGPLvED2fcAqOqjupillh6nMqaQPOPwdFw17BQ=&refcode=20181101i&amount=25)** to make sure he doesn’t win on Tuesday...and doesn’t get to make health decisions for women across America in the Senate!
**“I don’t believe it should be funded...”**

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: It gets worse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GTHHd5P637__wmKzTRU1HFZHBotlmPSUbYuDJybGKPk=/YIWCWvKlEaawg6cLjl9Vz92ZAoJNlXAnsi2vjDLjTNY=) Friends and Neighbors -- Earlier this week, I shared a**[ very interesting piece](https://act.myngp.com/el/GTHHd5P637__wmKzTRU1HFZHBotlmPSUbYuDJybGKPk=/qtNYoiEcFG58oMf-5yJDQCoR0nQFccaAzfe-i72GwPU=)** from _Politico_ about a North Carolina based investor named Greg Lindberg, who is being targeted in a federal investigation of "drug offenses, crimes against financial institutions, or money laundering crimes" \- **and donations from whom, the campaign of my opponent, and our current CFO, has yet to return.** That was bad but believe it or not, it gets worse. Now it turns out that **[Patronis is being sued](https://act.myngp.com/el/GTHHd5P637__wmKzTRU1HFZHBotlmPSUbYuDJybGKPk=/HwxRjVtLzs_pLrMkDtMDxNXeQy7buY2iBorrLyEM1Nk=)** by a former employee within his office as CFO, a state level, governmental position. Her alleged offense? **Not attending a campaign fundraiser.**

The former staffer apparently also failed to make a contribution to the campaign - which apparently played into the decision to let her go - from her role at the **governmental** office. Folks, this is cronyism, on full display. And it's yet another example of how our current CFO has redefined the role,** in the worst possible way, by misusing taxpayer resources - using _your_ hard-earned money for his own crass political purposes, while blurring all ethical boundaries in the process.** Things like this are exactly why I chose to throw my hat in the "ring" for this race. [Help JR get to the Cabinet. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/GTHHd5P637__wmKzTRU1HFZHBotlmPSUbYuDJybGKPk=/XVWEz-IWcdNPwjX5iJaBPi6mr7DgjoT4e4a6qjDzMkI=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) As your next CFO, I would make ensuring that your tax payer dollars are being spent the way you were promised they would be - and that your state government is working for _YOU_ , not anyone's political cronies or aspirations - a top priority. But I have an election to win first, in just **five days**. **And we are about to close the books on fundraising for this campaign, in just a matter of hours. ** **[Can you contribute $20.18 by midnight, to help me get the Cabinet back to working for _you_?](https://act.myngp.com/el/GTHHd5P637__wmKzTRU1HFZHBotlmPSUbYuDJybGKPk=/XVWEz-IWcdNPwjX5iJaBPi6mr7DgjoT4e4a6qjDzMkI=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all you have done and continue to do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States

name: Dana Bye
subject: Our campaign was the target of a dirty trick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
We learned yesterday that our campaign was the target of a dirty trick by an extremist group desperate to stop Abigail from unseating Rep. Dave Brat.
| | Peter, We learned yesterday that **our campaign was the target of a dirty trick by an extremist group** desperate to stop Abigail from unseating Rep. Dave Brat. The stated mission of this group, known as "Project Veritas," is to undermine the news media and Democratic campaigns. They go "undercover" and release deceptively edited video footage of their interactions with Democrats in an attempt to manufacture scandal. **A "Project Veritas" operative recently lied about her identity to our staff **so that she could enter our campaign office, ostensibly as a volunteer, but with the ulterior motive of wanting to find damaging information that could hurt our campaign. Of course, we have nothing to hide here at Team Spanberger, and we caught her in the act. Dirty tricks like these are the worst part of politics, **and this is exactly what Abigail is running to change.[Can you make a donation to our campaign, Peter, so that we can rise above these dirty tricks and send Abigail to Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/jUcQe-qvx8M1GxwFRiLLmvpfSLspREsSoXVbHG_vFig=/nQjniqc6FQ4EnZmV9X7EOxDrHHtIswBc1w2NyBaKWeY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)** While others may scrape the bottom of the barrel out of desperation, Abigail and our campaign will remain focused on talking to our neighbors on their doorsteps about the issues that matter to our community. That's the campaign voters deserve and it's the campaign that will carry us to victory, but we need your support to keep up the fight. We have just 5 days to go, [**so please make a donation today to support our efforts if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jUcQe-qvx8M1GxwFRiLLmvpfSLspREsSoXVbHG_vFig=/nQjniqc6FQ4EnZmV9X7EOxDrHHtIswBc1w2NyBaKWeY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jUcQe-qvx8M1GxwFRiLLmvpfSLspREsSoXVbHG_vFig=/nQjniqc6FQ4EnZmV9X7EOxDrHHtIswBc1w2NyBaKWeY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jUcQe-qvx8M1GxwFRiLLmvpfSLspREsSoXVbHG_vFig=/nQjniqc6FQ4EnZmV9X7EOxDrHHtIswBc1w2NyBaKWeY=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/jUcQe-qvx8M1GxwFRiLLmvpfSLspREsSoXVbHG_vFig=/fmHjORJPbltp5SIRWGAe7G_1Ztht215GrbiT5AVO4ek=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

Friend,

Everyone in the media is trying to tell Republican candidates how to win. But these are the same people who said we would lose in 2016.

Instead, I want to ask the voters themselves. With only 5 days until the election, I need YOUR input so that I can show every Republican running for office which issues are most important.

name: Ashley
subject: Help Fight the Pelosi-Pappas Machine
body:
Let me be frank...we desperately need your help. **We have 5 days until polls close** and Eddie has poured his heart and soul into this race. **Because of you,** Eddie's grassroots army has brought him to the edge and we now need your help to carry him over the top. Just this week, **Nancy Pelosi's Super PAC allies in Washington dropped over a half million dollars into New Hampshire to get her the Speaker's gavel next year. Do you know why they're doing that? Because polling is showing that this race is statistically TIED.** In addition, **Elizabeth Warren's radical resistance** is coming up from Massachusetts to influence our election. Over the next 5 days, **every voter contact in a race this close can make the difference in Nancy Pelosi getting control of the House.** **Can you spare 3 hours to help Eddie out by making phone calls and knocking on doors between now and Election Day?** Please sign up here: [https://www.edwardsfornh.com/volunteer](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyFEI154ondeA95x4WKE-2FOPrYiub-2B-2B51SlRyTqBCGGWL0_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mo1-2Bl7XL4rurVV1M-2FalFADoE0CC1QAetQrTxSnbTz2tk86JYZgz2fSOU06Wem7rGk6mSRzESfDBEXOWokCnQ3tFB1nNAEDw7ZYSbx04S7FoS7-2BWw2gNqMqGgAvGoV6NTewPIhSTh6VjGY-2FLqS9BZzRe-2FJT1An2cf15XHEZRK6PIGX8nc56hCErOeqE94RZEW7t-2BoFWgEFgEq5Al9LekGgglyfHYCBaK9BMQfUM7CzSBhJtXGDcj-2BRGR8hY5dcDegfB6rBwm-2BN-2BYEWAhsPqTJ7IQ-3D-3D) **\- Ashley** | |

clean_body: Let me be frank...we desperately need your help. We have 5 days until polls close and Eddie has poured his heart and soul into this race. Because of you, Eddie's grassroots army has brought him to the edge and we now need your help to carry him over the top. Just this week, Nancy Pelosi's Super PAC allies in Washington dropped over a half million dollars into New Hampshire to get her the Speaker's gavel next year. Do you know why they're doing that? Because polling is showing that this race is statistically TIED. In addition, Elizabeth Warren's radical resistance is coming up from Massachusetts to influence our election. Over the next 5 days, every voter contact in a race this close can make the difference in Nancy Pelosi getting control of the House. Can you spare 3 hours to help Eddie out by making phone calls and knocking on doors between now and Election Day? Please sign up here: \- Ashley | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Fwd: we didnt hit the goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Bad news - even with so many of you stepping up yesterday to help us hit our goal, we don't have enough to fund the final stage of this campaign.

If we don't hit this goal, we will be radically outnumbered on the ground right as Senator McCaskill and her team really get their ground operation going.

[Please - I need you to step up right now before it is too late.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=50c6ca784de4474e9757cd7520f42e4e&_e=h8xGMeB1U19ayH49WzIgy6eNJ3KU6bwEYpvcxW4b_HG_HPt14FMgTlSlYYleLW2uIKOoKfzvsoDkYIrt2aK_1k3kYKlSGj_aWv_iPy2psiuCVFt1PUfG-FtVFCFZHdMSNOxFycJaHCe2bionb2APeKV8TKHUjAjHVBcdXzGPXrAzt6fwC7pBZ5XY5c3OhMLvJzkWdc-1J4OZQQoZJj_wqQVRKD1DxVi7dz-7995otErChMtmCh-zrs41b6_oxmY1rPYXIjLCiyZ9Y2vGfMX971sa773_7Iau1BQJ2OAOLb6dLhwZnmLTm4e83lnU6JEUa8iRjB4FgkV0wwTw8-lkHgPWTCGHwLw_SIOfcNsYavmAZTloAWLbPiO7nfH19_kQQNoRrxtVt3KLVlayLS2n6A%3D%3D)

Josh

**\-------Forwarded Message-------**
**From** : Kyle
**To** : Josh
**Subject** : we didnt hit the goal
**Date** : Nov 1, 2018

Josh, no easy way to say this - we didn't meet the goal last night. Frankly, I don't know how we are going to fund the final GOTV push on the ground unless we raise another $15,000.

Also, Senator McCaskill has a huge operation on the ground in KC and STL that is only getting more active in talking to voters.

I'm not sure what to do.

Kyle

Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Kelly, Molly
subject: I'll get right to it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |

I'll get right to it, friends: **We still need to raise $8,360 by midnight to flip NH blue and take back the corner office.**
This election is just five days away. Because of supporters like you, we're almost back on track, but we can't afford to fall short and miss this goal. Chris Sununu has wealthy corporate backers bankrolling his campaign, but I'm refusing to take any money from corporate special interests - which means I can't win this race without the support of this grassroots team.
**The ONLY way we'll defeat Chris Sununu is if we hit every fundraising goal - I'm counting on you to keep us on track.**
**I wouldn't ask if it weren't absolutely critical, friends:[Will you donate $5 or more right now so we can defeat Chris Sununu and turn New Hampshire blue in November?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4abd/d0ce7de/50b6cd08/9cdeb54/1709653253/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjIxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk221-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| Just a reminder! We’re getting ready for the 14 County Tour on Monday, November 5! **We've updated the times, so please be sure to check out the new schedule below!**

We hope you can join us and Don Turner and team! If you can attend any or all of the stops please, [let us know by clicking here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5a9f130589&e=19cebfe173).

Thank you all for your continued support! We look forward to seeing you!
_**14 County Tour Schedule**_
Berlin: Maplewood Convenience Store; 4:10 - 4:30 am
Morrisville: Across from Hannaford’s shopping plaza; 5:15 - 5:25am
Orleans: Barton Park and Ride at Rt.5 and Rt.58; 6:00 - 6:15am
Island Pond: Legion parking lot; 7:00 \- 7:15am
St. Johnsbury: St. Jay Auto; 8:00 \- 8:15am
Bradford: Intersection of Rt.5 and Rt.25b; 8:55 \- 9:10am
White River Junction: The Station (bus terminal); 9:40 \- 10:00am
Springfield: Nortrax Equipment; 10:35 \- 10:55am
Brattleboro: O’Reilly Auto Parts; 11:20 \- 11:40am
Bennington: Vermont Veterans Deer Park; 12:40 \- 1:00pm
Rutland: AT&T, Route 7 South; 2:00 \- 2:20pm
Middlebury: Foster Motors; 3:15 \- 3:30pm
South Burlington: Goss Dodge; 4:25 \- 4:45pm
South Hero: Apple Island General Store; 5:10 \- 5:25pm
St. Albans: Taylor Park; 5:55 \- 6:15pm

**Celebration and Rally at Georgia Mountain Maples, 345 North Road, Milton; 6:30pm**

With just 5 days left until the election, news sources are calling the North Dakota Senate race a "sprint to the finish line."
**Mitch McConnell says that Senate control could come down to this state, and pundits and campaign experts agree that Senator Heidi Heitkamp is the most vulnerable Democrat in the country.**
We're running out of time to protect North Dakota's only Democratic senate seat, and polls show that Heidi absolutely cannot win here without you. [**Please make an emergency donation -- $3 or as much as you can -- to her campaign right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1d2/2a380d31/378e5d51/f16053/3977599792/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDFfTVdINEhIMV82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181101_MWH4HH1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

name: John Kerry
subject: time-sensitive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I'm personally reaching out with a time-sensitive request. I hate to be so blunt, but Democrats need a win in Arizona or any shot of taking back the House could disappear.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633df5/1a8421e1/19b5a58a1/4960cc4c/3021137181/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
**I 'm personally reaching out with a time-sensitive request:** [**Can I count on you to chip in $25 to Tom 's campaign right this moment?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I hate to be so blunt, but Democrats need a win in Arizona or any shot of taking back the House could disappear. And right now, taking back the House is a matter of unprecedented importance. As a former Secretary of State and proud American, I refuse to stand on the sidelines as our shared American ideals are threatened by a chaotic administration with misplaced values. **Let me be clear:** Our nation is at a critical juncture, and while we might sometimes feel powerless to create change -- [_**change is possible and we can make it happen right now by chipping in $25 or more to help elect Tom O 'Halleran.**_](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom understands that the integrity of our Democratic values is worth fighting for. And that's why I'm urging you to support him. **You can chip in to Tom 's campaign by clicking this link:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** When we see our country drifting down the wrong path, it's the duty of each and every one of us to take action. But time is running out. **Election Day is 5 days away and the fate of our country will be determined by what we do right now to support leaders like Tom.** **I 'm counting on you to rush a donation today -- your support could make the difference on Election Night:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/help-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you, John Kerry | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b1_jk_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633df5/1a8421e1/19b5a58a1/4960cc4f/3021137181/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633df5/1a8421e1/19b5a58a1/4960cc30/3021137181/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633df5/1a8421e1/19b5a58a1/4960cc31/3021137181/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Justin Barasky
subject: How do you want to feel on November 7th?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- I don't want to wake up on November 7th feeling like there was more I could have done to help Sherrod and change the outcome of this race. And I'd be willing to bet you don't want to feel that way, either. [**There 's one weekend between now and Election Day. It's so important that we do whatever we can to defend this Senate seat. Sign up now to volunteer this weekend.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2a/4462dc26/770770f6/201f14ac/914400186/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181101b") We've been all over the state over the course of this campaign. In the last week alone, Sherrod has traveled everywhere from Youngstown to Chillicothe to Mansfield, spending time with volunteers and thanking them for their hard work. [**I hope you 'll join them in volunteering in these next few days. Can you help out?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2a/4462dc26/770770f6/201f14ac/914400186/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181101b") Let's do this, Justin
---

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2a/4462dc26/770770f6/201f14a3/914400186/VEsF/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=t0LjMM7huNnGaRgHtknURxKukoGQa45KlKhI5X-Bbm2zm6FxFOfA1MqGbqrl5VV1nIw3FtYFjDlstm70Un-G2GxuwelYtKbSM9G4NwjGvAytwjwW2P7GEollGWxKi5XvsQLK6Cim2e7a6yJ5MvyfcVPjWFrLdH5pKDwJz7agTrN8SC_Vp3BXJRX-9vSDu9Hrm0hZ6_Jjc2F8xUU6WytpcAMSPjHiYlrwYCAh1tMnaRvWQYKbvzzOowjSMPVCrGUh). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=oHys1Rk8dPsSCaUBC_pSiTtTVXkBtyGdtSDGUvRdQO-gjMw_5c81yaifobvkF0eHVpcJHqCDzMi9www243lKBNtgVYLqMrdbpV5D89r3kq3YlK0cikTJiwJllyIFIRBoSZOobK_KjPw5sfYMUfMSk8ilwuTGbzts8LVK05rh8Tju94hSL7aXoOrQvrULGe9DO6YAoc0g47obLrNN_6nc_yd-Fm4NHup65IDgm59oxUmLSfFhha-BaBq-NW4oyman_Fw_Zj7iXeCqMGT3GDTJCyacwH8QUmYqzlP9GOzgH8PXDjDYXvzSz-8ZpVdDGwQp-25BhNWFHbPpOfEzQ6H9_N3apB8o9JDpMn_UisN5YjajoKD3JFHYO70UY7PZqCSE) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=oHys1Rk8dPsSCaUBC_pSiTtTVXkBtyGdtSDGUvRdQO_fCJfBN54uhEgPDsEStsEfiKf6pVB9ktZoVZSpf0wfupPi83S12SARGSpcv3CPJILlmtHgTac6dCZmoLXEzfScO75l6u2AkVeB1jwJ7gND6t4ENY_eIFIyD2bF_QcSk5x_UoNV7KSq69PEg29UgrQEkR8ulpzArEupcWvbRp5Wb-jahyg-Cg07ON1exwxImvbXgXN2m4nJA4dFdAddYZ-XJuZx3rcw21wVm1oWqg5OIZSwrX2XnQcY30AbLkOkuKE_qM5C96QlYm8t9cAs9XZvLrn6QNF0cjVjLcjq86V6VVTlhqVqAJvhNyb7ELlKLL3jxU_D_8NBr1qq7H8wGlA4) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=oHys1Rk8dPsSCaUBC_pSiQAIByG6qRw0YhnjFz_LRAZ28t865hdwaLCZM9kOHnq76Ttd6FL8A2CEj-mJTSVxx3KeqPY5Se8-qw7NfX-xcwyxgrIyLmY7Rx8kCHUukQdYO3uxgc5ES3RU65Su8O-AHSmtSHH9bIrbU-XTPvfqbqfmi8nc5DYSVFxHvDEz66KcNg9xYh9Mf4yCFZ41qe68MPI6HfMkCqFV-Fk99xi8qtoYPd1yBBsAW_ZoJh7SntF7YkxSp01SauvJIZdpJc89sA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=oHys1Rk8dPsSCaUBC_pSiVqxPIdFPkEK59FPQk0_MjIY_0JHdPdIuLD7gzOe9RHzEwKtKigO1u3V-BZDBRbSYJ-oLs7e_fQ6XBNOBuaxQiXw1UCCbWkKh16-PkWo1mHbsZBXykrKJjSekCmiCS5-RFV_N2Iq7BJagK8igEeTChhmvLcZQwlCJDc86uMcc2ZlcBhqPHEjJaNrdOAQOiXzGe3xUoKYXeuVL-kYN09IEgSNRshPmModBCOCypjEqw3dpi-ZatQ6jTWWRSG7V4nW9g%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=oHys1Rk8dPsSCaUBC_pSiUp1-9ArXz2qAUcp0P4uwyqs21RbrSHeygSyASNXaupKG_nl3bDSsrs4kgH_I7KDYlp_Jchuy799KMly7EWrgymnRlgX6yP91-F-soDwYlmC3W1NShzUQSM7R9ODcm-bJjvPWUb3xeqX3Gh3PEflff_2D8rUAxGSv9nt1KK6S0L_q2MOVDhLXccBTHrX-aKUl8L4rNvCaTGjFjJhkJxHvGE-zsAcZQc6nVTfminnF_cbnI9nAEgtKO198ZfIiiBjhg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=oHys1Rk8dPsSCaUBC_pSiTtTVXkBtyGdtSDGUvRdQO_19-shEbDvvIQZPIN2jePhuq_U9v0ltpZT65Jiq3ag5-Wk8D0xxDZIWxFIauuq9MJa-xYEJGGHaun1JZqcEcKaxjkrWeLX8DXosZfOEJoUWRMDm1UbsHkAqdH9UoJXb_jxM3wUvYoeeONJkGSwmdx_2u7Dw-F86l983Q8-UFGo45TizOe4gDUeSh66Esm8rTbpdLnImbxKd5vt9iR9jj9QWdCzydibM4h8D23pqK5CZubBs2wmrPoP9aD1nrUYgv8jyAPp7ExkfQcP0kFedUjX0PYwXKqRoXHCX-9PzlOE-MoOHB2pwRozeuqWE_Q5IoD2asisMtuJYd8yAKzZktvTL38W-P4A16DjZfdNFnSyJg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=t0LjMM7huNnGaRgHtknURxKukoGQa45KlKhI5X-Bbm2zm6FxFOfA1MqGbqrl5VV1nIw3FtYFjDlstm70Un-G2GxuwelYtKbSM9G4NwjGvAytwjwW2P7GEollGWxKi5XvsQLK6Cim2e7a6yJ5MvyfcVPjWFrLdH5pKDwJz7agTrN8SC_Vp3BXJRX-9vSDu9Hrm0hZ6_Jjc2F8xUU6WytpcAMSPjHiYlrwYCAh1tMnaRvWQYKbvzzOowjSMPVCrGUh) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=462625ff458143af8d539acc556894c8&_e=t0LjMM7huNnGaRgHtknURxKukoGQa45KlKhI5X-Bbm2zm6FxFOfA1MqGbqrl5VV1nIw3FtYFjDlstm70Un-G2GxuwelYtKbSM9G4NwjGvAytwjwW2P7GEollGWxKi5XvsQLK6Cim2e7a6yJ5MvyfcVPjWFrLdH5pKDwJz7agTrN8SC_Vp3BXJRX-9vSDu9Hrm0hZ6_Jjc2F8xUU6WytpcAMSPjHiYlrwYCAh1tMnaRvWQYKbvzzOowjSMPVCrGUh) to unsubscribe. clean_body: We're working overtime on the phones and doors to reach every voter in Wisconsin before Tuesday, November 6th, to make sure we're victorious, and..... ** Friend, there are just 5 days left before Election Day, and I have to ask you for a big favor. We're working overtime on the phones and doors to reach every voter in Wisconsin before Tuesday, November 6th, to make sure we're victorious, and I need your help to drive up Republican turnout across the state. Every bit helps. We just need to make sure we reach our goal by midnight TONIGHT so our field teams can plan ahead. Please, chip in now if you can! Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: here's an explanation:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
What is GOTV? |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7b1/34a064cc/c84106/70c8c21/2593047760/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hi there - We talk a lot about our GOTV program, so I wanted to take a moment to explain exactly what it is. GOTV stands for "Get Out The Vote." It's the final stage of the campaign when we reach out to all of Stacey's supporters, whether over the phone or by knocking on their front door, to make sure that every single one of them has a plan to vote. Over the past few months, we've done a lot of hard work getting the word out about Stacey's progressive vision for Georgia and letting voters know why she is the most experienced choice to lead our state forward. But all that hard work goes out the window if those Georgians don't cast a ballot! That's why, with just 5 days left until Election Day, we're putting all our efforts behind our GOTV program. In these final days, we need to turn the grassroots enthusiasm surrounding Stacey Abrams' campaign into a WIN on November 6th! But we need your help. We're running the largest GOTV program Georgia has ever seen, and our campaign staff can't do it alone. We're depending on volunteers to help us reach every single one of Stacey's supporters in all 159 counties THIS WEEKEND. Georgia's next Governor will be decided by just a few votes, for better or for worse. You might turn out the voter we need to make sure Stacey Abrams comes out ahead. So I'm asking you: **[Will you sign up for a GOTV shift? We need you to be knocking on doors every day between now and Election Day.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7b1/34a064cc/c84106/70c8c2e/2593047760/VEsE/ "http://bit.ly/DemVolEvents")** Thanks in advance for signing up for your shift. I know I can count on you. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams
---

[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7c39/51dbcc2a/166a26dd/3ac6c14/1982450544/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") This. Is. HUGE.

Ever since we found out that Bob's opponent outraised us during the first half of the month, I've been really worried. Now is not the time to fall behind in fundraising, not when we're buying our final ads and making critical strategic decisions about how to invest our resources in the final days of this campaign.

Last week a group of donors agreed to match donations from grassroots supporters like you, and they've been so impressed with the response that **they're extending the match through Get Out The Vote Weekend -- until midnight on Sunday. Peter -- **the Washington Swamp knows this race is close.**
That’s why after already spending millions of dollars to try and buy this race with false attacks on Phil Bredesen, they’re spending millions more in the last week of this election.
**In fact, Mitch McConnell Super PAC is now pouring nearly $3.7 million into Tennessee -- more than any other state in the group’s recent ad buy.**
They know that because of Phil Bredesen’s message and the get-out-the-vote operation you helped build, Tennesseans are turning out in record numbers to vote early -- and we’re expecting even more on Election Day.
But with tens of thousands of voters still undecided in this neck-and-neck race, we can’t let these dark money groups have the final say.

name: Steve Scalise
subject: "Pelosi declares victory before election day"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scalise For Congress
body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump: Pledge for More Career Opportunities Helped 6 Million
body:
West Wing Reads Logo

**

** President Trump: Pledge for More Career Opportunities Helped 6 Million
------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------------

“Four months after signing an executive order creating the National Council for the American Worker, President Donald Trump announced Wednesday that more than 160 companies and organizations have pledged to provide more than 6 million new career opportunities for Americans,” including apprenticeships, continuing education, on-the-job training, and reskilling, The Associated Press reports.

“This represents an enormous opportunity for us to think about making sure that every American worker is equipped with the skills they need,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump said from the State Dining Room yesterday.

Click here to read more. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41e0d66e36&e=3ee4985eea)

“How can you tell whether the economy is truly surging under President Trump? Just listen as the Democrats try to take at least some credit for the current economic boom,” former executive Andy Puzder writes in Fox News (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27ccb776ef&e=3ee4985eea) . “Let’s be clear: The economy is booming because President Trump reversed President Obama’s economic policies – not because Trump furthered the Obama policies.”

In RealClearPolitics (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fc6b0ab49&e=3ee4985eea) , Kalev Leetaru writes that data on recent media coverage of political violence reveals President Trump is right: There is a clear double standard that must be addressed. “When a Sanders supporter and campaign volunteer opened fire on GOP members, the media quickly stopped mentioning the connection,” Leetaru writes. “Yet days before anything was known about last week’s bomber, the media had settled on Trump as the cause.”

“New applications for U.S. unemployment aid fell last week and the number of Americans receiving benefits was the lowest in more than 45 years,” Reuters (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7aa3543d8d&e=3ee4985eea) reports. According to the Labor Department, initial claims for state unemployment benefits dropped 2,000 to a seasonally adjusted 214,000 for last week.

“Since January 2017, the Trump administration’s expansive efforts to identify, prevent and combat opioid misuse among injured federal workers receiving workers’ compensation benefits have generated effective and compassionate solutions,” Labor Secretary Alexander Acosta writes in the Concord Monitor (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d15f0daab5&e=3ee4985eea) . “This administration’s actions, including ours at the Department of Labor, have resulted in fewer injured federal employees using prescription opioids.”

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c7bbade07&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b07951681&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4801f514a6)

The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Tim Ryan
subject: What Joe Biden said:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
This year, I've been inspired by the Americans who have stepped up in defense of our values -- particularly those who have stepped into the arena to run for office. | |
---
Folks: I had a blast campaigning in Youngstown alongside Vice President Joe Biden on behalf of Rich Cordray, Betty Sutton, and Democrats up and down the ticket! Reading the news is tough these days. But like Joe said in Youngstown at our thousands-strong rally: **_"I 'm an optimist because I know the history of the journey of this country ... We have always had faith in the ability of ordinary people to do extraordinary things."_** This year, I've been inspired by the Americans who have stepped up in defense of our values -- particularly those who have stepped into the arena to run for office. [If elected, our House Game Changers won't just flip the House from red to blue -- they'll bring a new generation of leadership to Washington, D.C. Please donate $1 or any amount to each of our endorsed Game Changers to make sure we win big 5 days from today >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90aa/5486deaa/24e0c4ca/dcf0054/3601183817/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_gamechangers?refcode=em20181101_5days_30do&amount=15") [](secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_gamechangers?refcode=em20181101_5days_30do&amount=15) [CHIP IN](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90aa/5486deaa/24e0c4ca/dcf0057/3601183817/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_gamechangers?refcode=em20181101_5days_30do&amount=15") The stakes of this election are incredibly high -- and the outcome is still uncertain. But across the country, our Game Changers are turning the conventional wisdom upside down: \-- Recent polls show **Lucy McBath** , **Danny O'Connor** , and **Kathy Manning** statistically TIED with their opponents. _\-- Cook Political _has upgraded **Lauren Baer's** chances of winning, and recent polls show **Haley Stevens** and **Ron DiNicola **pulling into the lead! \-- Republican groups are playing defense and dumping in money to attack **Richard Ojeda** and**Joe Cunningham** who are competing in traditionally "red" districts. \-- Ohioans **Aftab Pureval, Betsy Rader, Theresa Gasper,** and**Ken Harbaugh** are running strong races in gerrymandered districts drawn specifically to stop Democrats from winning! **These campaigns are making their final budget decisions in the next few days. # Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

Reading the news is tough these days. But like Joe said in Youngstown at our thousands-strong rally: "I 'm an optimist because I know the history of the journey of this country ... We have always had faith in the ability of ordinary people to do extraordinary things." This year, I've been inspired by the Americans who have stepped up in defense of our values -- particularly those who have stepped into the arena to run for office. subject: FWD [MEMO] Get Out the Vote starts in two days

body:
| | Derek, I sent this out to the team earlier, but I wanted to ask you as well and see if you could help out.

My team of organizers and volunteers are out on the ground right now trying to reach all of the Democrats who need help turning out to the polls and it's pretty hard work. They're working incredibly long hours because they know how important this is.

**I 'm going to tell our organizers and volunteers on the ground that they will have grassroots support behind them as they finish this critical work. Can you donate to our field efforts in the final days so we can raise $35,000 to have all the materials we need to win and can focus on turning out voters in our most targeted areas?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f108b/3e0906/75ee9e3e/3e371263/3489014475/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+5&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND")

From: Lauren Reyes
Date: [Thurs November 1, 2018 at 8:17 a.m.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f108b/3e0906/75ee9e3e/3e371264/3489014475/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Thurs+November+1+2018+at+817+am&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND")
Subject: [MEMO] Get Out the Vote starts in two days
To: Kaine HQ, [Senior-Staff@TimKaine.com](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f108b/3e0906/75ee9e3e/3e37127b/3489014475/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+SeniorStaffTimKainecom&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND")

Team, we are now two days away from GOTV. We have hundreds of thousands of voters we still need to contact. Here's where we stand:

**House Races that are currently within the margin of error:

VA-02 Elaine Luria
VA-07 Abigail Spanberger
VA-05 Leslie Cockburn
VA-10 Jennifer Wexton**

These races could come down to one point, or hundreds of votes. And every race in Virginia is getting closer and could fall into this category by Tuesday - just look at Vangie Williams in VA-01, Jennifer Lewis in VA-06, and Anthony Flaccavento in VA-09.

We have identified the targets we need to talk to in order to close these margins, but we must reach them ALL in the final four-day push.

I need some last minute funds to make sure we have organizers and volunteers in all of these areas as well as canvassing materials and resources to recruit drivers to the polls and poll watchers. **I 'm collecting the funds on this page, can you forward this link far and wide so we don't have to pull resources during GOTV?**

Here's the link: [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f108b/3e0906/75ee9e3e/3e37127a/3489014475/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND")

My team needs $35,000 to cover all of these costs. Last time together with grassroots support we were able to reach our goal, so I'm hoping this works as well.

**Again, here 's the link to send to anyone who can help:** [https://secure.timkaine.com/November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f108b/3e0906/75ee9e3e/3e371279/3489014475/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNovember&utm_campaign=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND&source=20181101_2_FR_LR_field-LDND")

Kind regards,

_Lauren_

* * *
