name: Sherrod Brown
subject: we came up short yesterday...(need your help)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | They say bad things come in threes -- and it has certainly been true over the past few days...
* First, President Trump announced he's coming back to Ohio the day before Election Day. Trump is damn well determined to make sure I lose my job come November and this final push is his last attempt to defeat me.

* Then, a new poll shows we're losing ground against my opponent. The smears from Jim Renacci and special interests groups are working.

* On top of all of this, [**we MISSED our October goal and need to catch up _today._**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2b/4462dc26/7723b495/201f1488/4142096154/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181101?refcode=sbe181101_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2b/4462dc26/7723b495/201f148f/4142096154/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181101?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181101_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2b/4462dc26/7723b495/201f148f/4142096154/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181101?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181101_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2b/4462dc26/7723b495/201f148f/4142096154/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181101?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181101_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2b/4462dc26/7723b495/201f1488/4142096154/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181101?refcode=sbe181101_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** | | | [CHIP IN](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2b/4462dc26/7723b495/201f1488/4142096154/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181101?refcode=sbe181101_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
There's nothing we can do to stop Trump from coming to Ohio. We can't change the new poll.
**But Peter, we CAN do something about this missed goal.** And we really do need to fix that -- because every single dollar is critical to re-electing Sherrod.
[**We 've been given a 24-hour extension on our triple match program. If there's any way you can pitch in Peter, I'd be so thankful.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd2b/4462dc26/7723b495/201f1488/4142096154/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181101?refcode=sbe181101_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Team Walz-Flanagan
subject: not asking for money, friend
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend --

This isn't an email asking for money. Folks from every corner of this state stepped up for One Minnesota, and we're grateful. Now we're just 5 days from Election Day, and we need you on the doors and phones. We need your help getting out the vote for Tim and Peggy. This final weekend is absolutely the most critical time of this campaign. If we're going to win, we have to get our voters to the polls. subject: Did you return your absentee ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
This is your friendly reminder to mail your ballot in! |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa7b5/34a064cc/c313a2/70c8a60/371584409/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hi there, Are you voting absentee? Have you returned your ballot yet? If not, this is your friendly reminder to mail your ballot in! In order to have your vote count in this election, we _strongly recommend_ you send in your ballot by Friday, November 2nd (that's tomorrow!) to ensure it arrives in time. Just follow the instructions on the envelope to fill out your ballot. Mistakes can happen sometimes when people are moving fast, so take your time to make sure you've filled your ballot out correctly and are mailing it to the right location. And if you run into any problems or have ANY questions in the process, call our Voter Protection Hotline at 1-888-730-5816. Thank you for making your voice heard! \- Team Abrams P.S. Forward this email to any friends who might need an extra push to return their ballot! This race is close, so just a few more votes could push us over the edge to victory!

subject: Join Paul on his Kansas Common Sense Tour!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7zvetdgBwzXeDu0qxu17MewnzpAyIX1C-muuDPya__M=/V8FKA2jxFroZKddRDrktnE1eMXrq6nS07j3kHiiTOac=?gpsid=8_36_4801&ms=em18_181031_vote_adv_gq_ful__PD_ettx&refcode=em18_181031_vote_adv_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181031_vote_adv_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)

Dear Peter,

We've been so incredibly grateful for all of the support you've shown in this campaign -- it's crystal clear that the momentum in the 2nd Congressional District is with Paul Davis.

He is going to end this campaign the same way he started it -- by visiting all 25 counties and talking to voters about common sense policies that matter most to them -- and we hope you'll join him on one of his stops tomorrow! Here are the details:

Labette County Meeting and Greet
When: Friday, November 2nd, 8:00 AM
Where: Remnant Cafe, 1719 Main St, Parsons, KS 67357

Neosho County Meet & Greet
When: Friday, November 2nd, 10:30 AM
Where: The Grain Bin 314 East Main Street Chanute KS 66720

Wilson County Meet & Greet
When: Friday, November 2nd, 3:00 PM
Where: Neodesha Housing Authority 118 S 6th St, Neodesha, KS 66757

Woodson County Meet & Greet
When: Friday, November 2nd, 4:30 PM
Where: 114 South Main Street, Yates Center, KS

Allen County Meet & Greet
When: Friday, November 2nd, 5:45 PM
Where: Around the Corner Coffee and Eatery 102 S Washington Ave, Iola, KS 66749

We hope to see you on the trail!

Kerry Gooch
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: something to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there -- You probably know that in 2016, we won in New Hampshire by just 1,017 votes.
What you may not know is that thanks to your donations in the home stretch, my campaign put additional ads on the air the night before Election Day. We won by a fraction of a percent. **Without your help in the final days, I wouldn 't be in the Senate.**
Democrat Jacky Rosen is in a similar position. Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada is most likely to decide Senate control, and recent polls show a dead heat. [**I 'm living proof that $3 or more from you could decide this race, so I have to ask: please rush $3 or as much as you possibly can to power Jacky to victory in Nevada and win back a Democratic Senate.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc12e/2a380d31/3773f579/f160c5/3628403611/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0cm9zZW4iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTEwMV9NV0g0SlJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4rosen?refcode=e20181101_MWH4JR_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
It's crunch time, everyone, and this is when campaigns are won or lost.
With an extreme President in the White House, we desperately need Jacky's voice in the Senate. I'm counting on you to make sure she gets there.
There is no time left, so please give every dollar you can right now: [**https://hassan.bsd.net/Elect-Jacky-Rosen**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc12e/2a380d31/3773f579/f160c6/3628403611/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0cm9zZW4iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTEwMV9NV0g0SlJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4rosen?refcode=e20181101_MWH4JR_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Let this sink in
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | **If Democrats don't win back the House this year, we will have another two years of President Trump and his Republican allies having complete control of Washington.** | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9b/622b7b5b/1dafc81c/307b640f/2771648141/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181101?refcode=dwse181101_b&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
Think about that. Let it sink in. Then pick up a phone, go volunteer, or [**donate a few dollars**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9b/622b7b5b/1dafc81c/307b640f/2771648141/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181101?refcode=dwse181101_b&recurring=true&amount=5") and -- _Get. To. Work._
With the election days away, our GOTV efforts are in full swing. [**We need this extra $15,000 before the polls close and we are not even close right now -- $9,600 away. Will you rush in a contribution?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9b/622b7b5b/1dafc81c/307b640f/2771648141/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181101?refcode=dwse181101_b&recurring=true&amount=5")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9b/622b7b5b/1dafc81c/307b640e/2771648141/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181101?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse181101_b_5&refcode2=861769")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9b/622b7b5b/1dafc81c/307b640e/2771648141/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181101?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse181101_b_10&refcode2=861769")**
**[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9b/622b7b5b/1dafc81c/307b640e/2771648141/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181101?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse181101_b_25&refcode2=861769")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9b/622b7b5b/1dafc81c/307b6401/2771648141/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAxIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181101?refcode=dwse181101_b_other&refcode2=861769")**
This time next week, it'll be too late to do anything about the outcome of the midterm elections.
Whether we're left celebrating our new Democratic majority or dealing with the fallout of crushing defeats all depends on how hard we fight right now.
Right-wing Super PACs and national Republican groups are in panic mode right now. Trump is crisscrossing the country, including Florida, trying to rally his supporters to vote for Republican candidates. Super PACs and groups are pouring money into competitive House and Senate races.
**Our turnout effort will help our candidates up and down the ballot.** We cannot get complacent. We cannot back down. **Every second from now through Election Day matters, and we need to make the best use of each and every one.**
[**Give what you can right now. Every contribution that comes in is incredibly important in this final week.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9b/622b7b5b/1dafc81c/307b640f/2771648141/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181101?refcode=dwse181101_b&recurring=true&amount=5")
Thanks!
Debbie

subject: The most despicable attack ad yet

body:

name: Team Bredesen
subject: Big News: A slew of major endorsements
body:
|
#
Peter,we’ve got some great news -- newspapers across Tennessee agree that Phil Bredesen is the right choice in this election. | | _Knox News Sentinel_
**In this era of dissension, though, Phil Bredesen's fair-mindedness, independence and civility are even more valuable, and they make him the right choice to don Tennessee’s historic mantle of statesmanship in the U.S. Senate.**
* * *
_Johnson City Press_
**Tennessee does not need just a yes-person to satisfy a single agenda in the Senate — it needs a practical, unconstrained thinker... We recommend a vote for Phil Bredesen for U.S. Senate.**
* * *
_Commercial Appeal_
**Tennessee voters should continue their long and proud tradition and send another Tennessee moderate, Phil Bredesen, to Washington.**
* * *
_Tennessee Tribune_
**The Tribune endorses Phil Bredesen for Senator, someone who will be able to bring some semblance of adult behavior to Washington, D.C. from this state.**
* * *
_Chattanooga Times_
**The records of Bredesen and Blackburn make it clear that if we want a real problem-solver, we must vote for Bredesen.**
---
The support we’re seeing from editorial boards, community leaders, Democrats, Republicans, and Independents across Tennessee is nothing short of historic.
But the same can be said for the unprecedented millions of dollars in false, negative ads we’re facing right now from out-of-state dark money groups. With just days left until Election Day, we can’t afford to let these attacks define the end of this race.
**Please add a donation of $10 or whatever amount you can pitch in to help us capitalize on this momentum and win on Election Day.**

clean_body: | Peter,we’ve got some great news -- newspapers across Tennessee agree that Phil Bredesen is the right choice in this election. | | Knox News Sentinel In this era of dissension, though, Phil Bredesen's fair-mindedness, independence and civility are even more valuable, and they make him the right choice to don Tennessee’s historic mantle of statesmanship in the U.S. Senate. Johnson City Press Tennessee does not need just a yes-person to satisfy a single agenda in the Senate — it needs a practical, unconstrained thinker... We recommend a vote for Phil Bredesen for U.S. Senate. Commercial Appeal Tennessee voters should continue their long and proud tradition and send another Tennessee moderate, Phil Bredesen, to Washington. Tennessee Tribune The Tribune endorses Phil Bredesen for Senator, someone who will be able to bring some semblance of adult behavior to Washington, D.C. from this state. Chattanooga Times The records of Bredesen and Blackburn make it clear that if we want a real problem-solver, we must vote for Bredesen. The support we’re seeing from editorial boards, community leaders, Democrats, Republicans, and Independents across Tennessee is nothing short of historic. But the same can be said for the unprecedented millions of dollars in false, negative ads we’re facing right now from out-of-state dark money groups. With just days left until Election Day, we can’t afford to let these attacks define the end of this race. Please add a donation of $10 or whatever amount you can pitch in to help us capitalize on this momentum and win on Election Day. body:
Can help us reach 250 donations for Katie Hill by the end of today? Peter, folks are really stepping up for Katie Hill since our last email. In fact, last night alone, 78 people contributed!

**I want to see just how far we can go to flip this critical House district.** So we're setting a grassroots challenge: hitting 250 donations for Katie by the end of today!

[**Will you help us reach this goal? Your support will provide a critical boost to Katie 's GOTV efforts with just 5 days left!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?refcode=RTW_181101_Hill_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Experts on both sides agree that CA-25 will come down to the wire. With the final margin potentially just hundreds of votes, I want to be able to say that we did all we could to flip the seat.

**You can make a secure donation here:[http://ca.voteforlinda.com/katie-hill](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?refcode=RTW_181101_Hill_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Fired up!

Linda

**\---- ORIGINAL MESSAGE ----**
> Peter,
>
> We've told you about Katie Hill a few times now. She's an advocate for homeless veterans and an executive with years of experience in the nonprofit sector. She's running in California's 25th District against Steve Knight, a Republican congressman who's rubber-stamped every bit of the Trump agenda.
>
> If we want to take back the House, we need to win every race like Katie's. But the latest forecast from _FiveThirtyEight_ has CA-25 within THREE POINTS -- too close to call. > ---
> ******[Donate $25 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503669f/4ac3d62d/69f23387/1ce29a2a/808693603/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_181101_Hill_EM")******
> ******[Donate $50 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503669f/4ac3d62d/69f23387/1ce29a2b/808693603/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_181101_Hill_EM")******
> ******[Donate $100 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503669f/4ac3d62d/69f23387/1ce29a28/808693603/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_181101_Hill_EM")******
> ******[Donate $250 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503669f/4ac3d62d/69f23387/1ce29a29/808693603/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=RTW_181101_Hill_EM")******
> ******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?refcode=RTW_181101_Hill_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
> Steve Knight isn't fighting for us. After refusing to endorse in the 2016 presidential election -- and saying he was disturbed by Donald Trump's behavior -- he still voted for Trump anyway.
>
> Since then, Congressman Knight has voted with Donald Trump 98.9% of the time.
>
> Katie Hill would bring a principled, independent voice to the 25th District. Steve Knight is just more of the same failed policies and leadership that have let Donald Trump run amok.
>
> [**Please, help us make a change and flip this seat. Chip in to support Katie Hill before Election Day >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_ls_hill?refcode=RTW_181101_Hill_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We only have FIVE DAYS to fight back and protect Bob Casey

Donate $5 to show the NRA where you stand:

[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181101_fr2_v1s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Greg Stanton
subject: making my dad proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
As Mayor, I made it a priority to expand and improve Phoenix's public transportation system.

It is one of the accomplishments I am most proud of - it is helping families all across our community, bringing billions of dollars in investments, creating thousands of jobs, and, on a personal level, I know it made my dad proud. Growing up, public transportation was a lifeline for my family and my vision as Mayor and next in Congress is to make sure everyone has access to safe and affordable transit.

[**Watch our last ad of the campaign and find out why >>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_xrsqO1TiZqcjxbdX1Yvg0FwrkKhD90oeXt90nMeY7Y=/8omhgSqUIpwZo_1EoSMostAggSCFKcTa-ShAGmyU9G4=?refcode=x_110118_Lightrailad_b&amount=25&recurring=auto)

name: Cory Booker
subject: We need my friend, Bob Menendez in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

It bears repeating over and over again:

**We need Bob Menendez in the U.S. Senate. He's a fighter for New Jersey, and if we don't send Bob back to the Senate then President Trump will control this vital Senate seat.**

Every single day, I see just how hard Bob fights for New Jerseyans -- day in and day out. And I wish every New Jersey resident could see what I see.

Senator Bob Menendez never stops working for New Jersey.

**And that is the kind of leadership this state deserves -- a true New Jerseyan who loves this state and is committed to fighting for its people.**

[**Help us keep my friend Bob Menendez in the U.S. Senate fighting for us all by chipping in $5 or more today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf4/3af3c5d/38328d09/4ec318c8/3796967130/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-corybooker?gpsid=5_73_4887&refcode=em18_181101_Booker_fnd_gq_cust__CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181101_Booker_fnd_gq_cust__CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+keep+my+friend+Bob+Menendez+in+t")

Bob Menendez has time and again fought for and secured funding for infrastructure and education in our state; he fought tirelessly to stop the separation of families at our country's border, and he was instrumental in helping our cities and towns rebuild in the wake of Hurricane Sandy.

This is who Bob Menendez is. He wakes up every single day determined to struggle and fight for New Jersey.

So I will say it again: **We need Bob Menendez.**

[**Help keep Bob in the Senate so he can continue fighting for our families. The alternative is truly unthinkable. Contribute $5 or whatever you can today and together we can win again on November 6th -- for New Jersey.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf4/3af3c5d/38328d09/4ec318cb/3796967130/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-corybooker?gpsid=5_73_4887&refcode=em18_181101_Booker_fnd_gq_cust__CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181101_Booker_fnd_gq_cust__CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Help+keep+Bob+in+the+Senate+so+he+can+co")

Thank you,

Cory

Chris Sununu and his big-dollar right-wing corporate donors are flooding this race with attack ads to defeat me, so I'm counting on grassroots donors to raise the final $3,506 we need to hit our fundraising goal. "" I'm so grateful for your support. Wish me luck out there! Molly | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" | | Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. Debby Butler, Fiscal Agent

name: Tina Smith
subject: Our debate starts in less than an hour, but I wanted to send you a quick note first.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Hope you can read.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d2cb/c1f7015/6eabda40/1140a8a2/487954141/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiNTU3ODMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6InJ0d18yMDE4MTEwMS0yX2VtIn0=/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_18011_debate?source=rtw_20181101-2_em&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783") Friend, I will share at the debate tonight that as progressives we must forcefully declare that we are pro-choice, believe in climate change, are fighting for a living wage, for affordable health care, and for equality everywhere. These are core values to our campaign -- and to me. And they are why I'm in this race. I'm ready to defend our values at the debate tonight, but I need to know you're in this with me. **[Will you add your name here and say you're on this team before I step on the stage? It would mean so much to me to see your name on this. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d2cb/c1f7015/6eabda40/1140a8a2/487954141/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiNTU3ODMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6InJ0d18yMDE4MTEwMS0yX2VtIn0=/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_18011_debate?source=rtw_20181101-2_em&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783")** **[Add Your Name](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d2cb/c1f7015/6eabda40/1140a8a2/487954141/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiNTU3ODMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6InJ0d18yMDE4MTEwMS0yX2VtIn0=/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_18011_debate?source=rtw_20181101-2_em&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783")** Tina

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: I am writing to ask if you would make a $3 contribution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181101&t=1001&akid=23393%2E444211%2E6y-8Qf ]Beto for Texas

We weren’t expecting this -- but I can’t say I’m that surprised. With the
polls tightening closer and closer, a super PAC funded by Sheldon Adelson
just dropped more than half a million dollars behind ads attacking Beto.
That kind of money works quickly. We need to fight back -- fast.

Unlike Senator Cruz, Beto doesn't have PACs waiting in the wings, ready to
drop millions attacking our opponent. Our campaign relies on grassroots
donations from real people -- many in response to emails like the one
you're reading right now.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181101&t=1020&akid=23393%2E444211%2E6y-8Qf ]That’s why I’m writing today. If you
can afford to, can you give a
contribution of
$3
or more to help us reach our FINAL fundraising goal? We need to raise $3.5
million before polls close on Election Day -- just 5 short days away.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181101&t=1021&akid=23393%2E444211%2E6y-8Qf ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181101&t=1022&akid=23393%2E444211%2E6y-8Qf ]Beto for Texas

I know we ask a lot of you -- but trust me, I wouldn’t be asking if I
didn’t think we could rise up and meet this challenge.

Thanks for helping us set the record straight. Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas
